phases.name: Choice-label read-count resolution (#4b)
phases.description: Resolve dotted read-count references to a nested choice label (in a guard or inline conditional) to .readCount(path), so they stop surviving as unresolvable .variableReference. Extends the prior weave-label resolution to nested choice labels. Compiler/ only; no runtime change.

steps.name: Resolve nested choice-label read-count references
criteria: A dotted read-count ref to a nested choice label resolves to .readCount in both a guard ({not knot.label}) and an inline conditional ({knot.label: text}).
The newly-resolved target containers carry the 0x1 CountVisits flag (via the existing auto-flag reconciliation) so the read count evaluates at runtime.
A dotted name resolving to no known label/knot/stitch still falls through to .variableReference (not an error).
The rc-choicelabel-guard and rc-choicelabel-inline ATs pass (native==oracle) and their .disabled traits are removed.
No regression in the existing weave / read-count / variable-text corpus.
steps.scenario_name: read-count of a nested choice label used in a guard suppresses the guarded choice, matching the oracle
steps.implementation_notes: TEST PARADIGM: example-based Swift Testing oracle execution-equivalence (compileAndPlay) per CLAUDE.md (OOP; PBT N/A). Backtick function-name style MANDATORY; @Test("string") FORBIDDEN. CONTEXT: the playback probe (DIAG_INTERCEPT2) shows native TheIntercept dead-ends at output line 4 because two dotted refs to nested CHOICE LABELS survive unresolved as .variableReference: start.delay (in a guard {not start.delay}) and harris_demands_component.cant_talk_right (inline {..: helplessly}). The prior weave-label slice resolves a simpler shape (the green RED-pin: a root/stitch label in a plain condition) but NOT a choice label nested in a knot referenced from a guard/inline. INVESTIGATE in RED: why the discovery pre-pass / weaveLabelPaths registration + lowerExpression resolution miss these (likely the pre-pass does not register nested choice labels, or registers them under a path that does not match the dotted source name knot.label). FIX: extend the discovery pre-pass (WeaveEmitter) to register nested choice labels' absolute paths under their source-dotted name (reuse the resolver's already-computed keyPrefix; never re-derive), and ensure lowerExpression resolves them (RuntimeObjectEmitter); the existing post-emission auto-flag reconciliation then flags the resolved .readCount targets. Boundary: Compiler/ only; no Engine/ import (R1); no JSONSerialization (R5); no runtime/Decoder change. Do NOT re-enable the TheIntercept e2e (needs #4a too).

validation.reviewer: orchestrator (gates + AT-mapping; derives from probe diagnosis + Accepted ADR-012 #4b + distilled ATs)
validation.notes: Single coherent fix: both #4b ATs (rc-choicelabel-guard, rc-choicelabel-inline) share one root cause (nested choice-label resolution not reached by the prior weave-label slice). des-roadmap validate + integrity --roadmap-only to be run before execution. Boundary R1/R3/R5 + no-runtime-change held.
